examples: We started off on our journey at dawn.
She started off without waiting for us.
He started off by introducing himself.
We started off early in the morning.
They started off on the right foot.
She started off her career as a teacher.
They started off for the mountains.
He started off on his new adventure.
Let's start off with a warm-up exercise.
example_translate: Мы отправились в путь на рассвете.
Он отправился в своё новое приключение.
start off.synonyms:
Начинать, стартовать - begin, start, commence
Отправляться в путь - set off, depart, leave
